name: @pryzm/climate-host
description: A.10.b/c (Phase A · Sprint 2) — L2 pure climate-data adapters.  EPW TMY3 parser (string → validated EPWRecord[]), monthly-normals / wind-rose / design-temperatures / degree-days aggregators (EPWRecord[] → C21 aggregates), and the deterministic NOAA solar-position reader (lat, lon, dateTime → SolarSample).  Zero I/O at this layer — caller supplies the EPW file as a string.  Reusable by L3 ClimateStore (A.10.d), L5 climate UI panels (A.11), and L7 plugin authors (eg energy-sim plugins).
